Class MilvusVectorStore.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<MilvusVectorStore.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.milvus.MilvusVectorStore.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStore.Builder<MilvusVectorStore.Builder>
Enclosing class:
MilvusVectorStore
public static class MilvusVectorStore.Builder extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<MilvusVectorStore.Builder>
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Soby Chacko, Thomas Vitale, Ilayaperumal Gopinathan, chabinhwang

    Configures the Milvus metric type to use for similarity calculations.

    Methods inherited from class AbstractVectorStoreBuilder

  • Method Details

    • metricType

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder metricType(io.milvus.param.MetricType metricType)
      Configures the Milvus metric type to use for similarity calculations. See: https://milvus.io/docs/metric.md#floating for details on metric types.
      Parameters:
      metricType - the metric type to use (IP, L2, or COSINE)
      Returns:
      this builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if metricType is null or not one of IP, L2, or COSINE

    • indexType

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder indexType(io.milvus.param.IndexType indexType)
      Configures the Milvus index type to use for vector search optimization.
      Parameters:
      indexType - the index type to use (defaults to IVF_FLAT if not specified)
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • indexParameters

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder indexParameters(String indexParameters)
      Configures the Milvus index parameters as a JSON string.
      Parameters:
      indexParameters - the index parameters to use (defaults to {"nlist":1024} if not specified)
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • databaseName

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder databaseName(String databaseName)
      Configures the Milvus database name.
      Parameters:
      databaseName - the database name to use (defaults to DEFAULT_DATABASE_NAME if not specified)
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • collectionName

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder collectionName(String collectionName)
      Configures the Milvus collection name.
      Parameters:
      collectionName - the collection name to use (defaults to DEFAULT_COLLECTION_NAME if not specified)
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • embeddingDimension

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder embeddingDimension(int newEmbeddingDimension)
      Configures the dimension size of the embedding vectors.
      Parameters:
      newEmbeddingDimension - The dimension of the embedding (must be between 1 and 32768)
      Returns:
      this builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if dimension is not between 1 and 32768

    • iDFieldName

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder iDFieldName(String idFieldName)
      Configures the name of the field used for document IDs.
      Parameters:
      idFieldName - The name for the ID field (defaults to DOC_ID_FIELD_NAME)
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • autoId

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder autoId(boolean isAutoId)
      Configures whether to use auto-generated IDs for documents.
      Parameters:
      isAutoId - true to enable auto-generated IDs, false to use provided IDs
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • contentFieldName

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder contentFieldName(String contentFieldName)
      Configures the name of the field used for document content.
      Parameters:
      contentFieldName - The name for the content field (defaults to CONTENT_FIELD_NAME)
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • metadataFieldName

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder metadataFieldName(String metadataFieldName)
      Configures the name of the field used for document metadata.
      Parameters:
      metadataFieldName - The name for the metadata field (defaults to METADATA_FIELD_NAME)
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • embeddingFieldName

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder embeddingFieldName(String embeddingFieldName)
      Configures the name of the field used for embedding vectors.
      Parameters:
      embeddingFieldName - The name for the embedding field (defaults to EMBEDDING_FIELD_NAME)
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • initializeSchema

      public MilvusVectorStore.Builder initializeSchema(boolean initializeSchema)
      Configures whether to initialize the collection schema automatically.
      Parameters:
      initializeSchema - true to initialize schema automatically, false to use existing schema
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • build

      public MilvusVectorStore build()
      Builds and returns a new MilvusVectorStore instance with the configured settings.
      Returns:
      a new MilvusVectorStore instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the builder configuration is invalid
